title: Catarineau & Givens P.A. FULL LEAK! ransomware incident

extortion.description: 30 GB of corporate and personal client files exfiltrated (criminal records, SSN, DL photos, sex offender records, legal cases, W-4, W-9, corporate clients' financial statements & tax returns statements)  Catarineau & Givens offers accounting, bookkeeping, employee benefits, consulting, retirement planning, audits, and taxation services.  Think twice before using their services.They did nothing to protect your data.
